objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 free-time words, can/can't grammar for ability and permission, listening, speaking, homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. Чөлөөт цагийн 20 шинэ үг, can/can't дүрэм (чадвар ба зөвшөөрөл), сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Review Week 1 vocabulary and learn how to talk about hobbies and abilities using can / can't.
contentMn: 1-р долоо хоногийн үгсийг давтан, can / can't ашиглан хобби, чадварын тухай ярьж сурна.

vocabulary.example: I write in English every day.
What do you do in free time?

quiz.question: She _____ sing very well.
quiz.explanation: Can is the same for all subjects — no -s for he/she.

quiz.question: Which sentence is correct?
quiz.explanation: After 'can' use the base verb without 'to'.

quiz.question: Make a question: ___ he sing?
quiz.explanation: For questions, put 'can' at the front.

quiz.question: What does 'can' express?
quiz.explanation: Can = ability (I can swim) and permission (Can I go?).

quiz.question: What CAN Bat play very well? (from listening)
quiz.explanation: Bat says he can play football.

quiz.question: Can Bat sing?
options: No, he can't sing at all
quiz.answer: No, he can't sing at all
quiz.explanation: Bat says 'I can't sing at all!' in the listening.

quiz.question: What can Sarnai do?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai can draw, dance, and speak a little English.

quiz.question: Which is a correct negative sentence?
quiz.explanation: After can't use the base verb.

quiz.question: How do students feel about English?

page1.grammarExplanation: 'Can' expresses ABILITY (what you are able to do) and PERMISSION (what you are allowed to do). CAN is the SAME for ALL subjects — it NEVER changes! No -s for he/she. After 'can' always use the BASE VERB — never add 'to'! Negative: cannot / can't. Question: put 'can' at the front. 'Can' нь чадвар (чадах зүйл) ба зөвшөөрөл (зөвшөөрөгдсөн зүйл)-ийг илэрхийлдэг. Can нь БҮХ субьекттай ИЖИЛ — хэзээ ч өөрчлөгддөггүй! He/She-д -s нэмдэггүй! Can-ы дараа ҮРГЭЛЖ ҮНДСЭН ҮЙЛҮГ хэрэглэ — 'to' нэмдэггүй!
commonMistakes: She cans sing → She can sing
I can to swim → I can swim (no 'to'!)
Can he swims? → Can he swim?
I cannot to dance → I can't dance

page2.readingPassage: Today is Sunday — Bat's favorite day! He can relax and do what he loves. In the morning, he runs in the park. He can play football very well. In the afternoon, he plays with friends. He can't stay home on sunny days — he loves being outside! In the evening, he reads an English book and practices his vocabulary. He says: 'I can speak more English every day!'
speakingQuestions: 1. What can you do well? / Та юуг сайн хийж чаддаг вэ?
2. Can you swim? / Та сэлж чаддаг уу?
3. What can't you do? / Та юуг хийж чаддаггүй вэ?
4. What do you do in your free time?
5. Can you cook? / Та хоол хийж чаддаг уу?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What can you do in your free time?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I can play guitar and draw. What about you?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: I can swim and run. Can you swim?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: No, I can't swim but I want to learn!

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: I can teach you! Can you ride a bicycle?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes! I can ride very well. Can you?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: Yes! Let's ride bicycles this weekend!

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Great idea! Can we go to the park?

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Teacher: It's Friday! Let's review Week 1. What did we study? Bat: We studied greetings, numbers, family, colors, food, and places! Teacher: Excellent! And today — can. Bat, what can you do? Bat: I can play football, swim, and cook a little! Teacher: Can you sing? Bat: No, I can't sing at all! (laughs) Teacher: Sarnai, what about you? Sarnai: I can draw, dance, and speak a little English now! Students: Yes, we can! A little, but we CAN!

listeningQuestions.question: What does the teacher say at end?
How do students feel about English?

homework: ✍ Writing: Write 5 sentences 'I can...' and 5 sentences 'I can't...'
📖 Vocabulary: Review ALL 140 vocabulary words from Week 1 — test yourself!
🗣️ Speaking: Write a short paragraph about your free time (5-7 sentences).
🔁 Celebrate: 🎉 You completed Week 1 of 'Speak English in 90 Days'!
completionSummary: 🎉 Finished Week 1 of 'Speak English in 90 Days'!
